notes: Market-neutral monthly XTI/XNG long-horizon value package from approved card AMP-VALUE-2013_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1; rank synchronized log(mean completed month-end close at 54 through 66 months / latest completed month-end close), buy the higher-value leg, and sell the lower-value leg. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
